ddls:
CREATE TABLE "jcf_implementations" (
  "impl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each JCF implementation */,
  "impl_name" TEXT /* Name of the JCF implementation (e.g., ArrayList, HashMap) */,
  "interface" TEXT /* Interface implemented by the JCF implementation */,
  "is_sorted" INTEGER /* Whether the implementation is sorted */,
  "calls_hash_code" INTEGER /* Whether the implementation calls hashCode() */,
  "calls_compare_to" INTEGER /* Whether the implementation calls compareTo() */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the JCF implementation */,
  "jdk_version" TEXT /* JDK version that the implementation is compatible with */,
  "implementation_type" TEXT /* Type of implementation (e.g., array-based, linked-based) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impl_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "impl_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JCF implementation */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken to perform the operation */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the time taken */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_impl_id FOREIGN KEY ("impl_id") REFERENCES jcf_implementations ("impl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario (e.g., small dataset, large dataset) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the scenario */,
  "dataset_size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset used in the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., insertion, deletion, search) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_performance_metrics, edit_jcf_implementations) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_history" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "row_id" INTEGER /* ID of the row where the change was made */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column where the change was made */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the export */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date when the export was performed */,
  "data" TEXT /* Exported data in binary format */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the import */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the import was performed */,
  "data" TEXT /* Imported data in binary format */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
